key_change: Phase 15 daily indexing now uses: python3 scripts/safe-gsc-ui-indexing-queue.py --source tier3 --limit 10 --execute

queue_priority.priority1: tier3 — all 105 Tier 3 calculators until PROVEN_SUCCESS
queue_priority.priority2: changed_high_value — pages edited in last 48h needing re-indexing
queue_priority.priority3: recovery — high-impression pages with 0 clicks (CTR rescue)
queue_priority.fallback: If tier3 blocked, report blocker then process priority2/3

cli_usage.default_mode: python3 scripts/safe-gsc-ui-indexing-queue.py (uses queue file, not tier3)

phase15_daily_rule: Step 3 (Calculator Indexing) MUST use --source tier3 until all 105 T3 calculators have PROVEN_SUCCESS status in proof ledger. Blog impression pages do NOT replace T3 calculator indexing.
proof_requirement: Every submission logged to gsc-ui-indexing-proof-ledger.json with status. No proof = not counted.
